def test_base_add_object():
    try: 
        pool = makeEmptyPool0(3)
    except NotImplementedError:
        return
    try: 
        assertEqual(pool.getNumIdle(), 0)
        assertEqual(pool.getNumActive(), 0)
        pool.addObject()
        assertEqual(pool.getNumIdle(), 1)
        assertEqual(pool.getNumActive(), 0)
        obj = pool.borrowObject()
        assertEqual(obj, getNthObject(0))
        assertEqual(pool.getNumIdle(), 0)
        assertEqual(pool.getNumActive(), 1)
        pool.returnObject(obj)
        assertEqual(pool.getNumIdle(), 1)
        assertEqual(pool.getNumActive(), 0)
    except NotImplementedError:
        return
    finally: 
        pool.close()
```

@skipIf(UnsupportedOperationException, "Skip this test if unsupported")
def test_base_borrow_return():
    try: 
        pool = makeEmptyPool0(3)
    except UnsupportedOperationException:
        return
    
    obj0 = pool.borrowObject()
    assert getNthObject(0), obj0
    obj1 = pool.borrowObject()
    assert getNthObject(1), obj1
    obj2 = pool.borrowObject()
    assert getNthObject(2), obj2
    
    pool.returnObject(obj2)
    obj2 = pool.borrowObject()
    assert getNthObject(2), obj2
    
    pool.returnObject(obj1)
    obj1 = pool.borrowObject()
    assert getNthObject(1), obj1
    
    pool.returnObject(obj0)
    pool.returnObject(obj2)
    obj2 = pool.borrowObject()
    if isLifo(): 
        assert getNthObject(2), obj2
        
    if isFifo(): 
        assert getNthObject(0), obj2
    
    obj0 = pool.borrowObject()
    if isLifo(): 
        assert getNthObject(0), obj0
        
    if isFifo(): 
        assert getNthObject(2), obj0
        
    pool.close()
```
